items.blocked_reason: Release v1.0.1 PUBLISHED by agent 2026-07-16 (explicitly authorized): artifacts + checksum + notes live; description/topics set; fresh-clone verification green; content gates swept and fixed. Remaining: Michael's ONE visibility-flip command (agent never changes access controls) — see SUBMISSION.md.

Agent verified the live form 2026-07-16 (categories, <3-min PUBLIC video rule, Jul 21 5pm PT deadline — recorded in SUBMISSION.md) but stopped exactly at the Devpost login screen: no authenticated session, and the agent cannot enter credentials.
